text: Trump vows to sink Iranian ships approaching a U.S. blockade of Strait of Hormuz - NPR
fullText: President Trump said the U.S. would interdict vessels that had to pay what he called an "illegal toll" to Iran to cross the Strait of Hormuz.

text: DHS orders thousands of furloughed employees back to work despite ongoing shutdown - CBS News
fullText: The Department of Homeland Security has ordered thousands of furloughed employees back to work, even as the agency technically remains shut down and unfunded by Congress.

text: Coachella 2026: The 15 Best Moments From Weekend One - Rolling Stone
fullText: From the first Latina to ever headline Coachella, to the first Filipino group to play the desert fest, here are 15 of the most memorable moments.

text: Colombia to euthanize dozens of "cocaine hippos" linked to drug lord Pablo Escobar in bid to control population - CBS News
fullText: The hippos are the descendants of four brought to the country in the 1980s by notorious drug lord Pablo Escobar as he built a private zoo.

text: Report: FBI raids Texas home of man suspected of firebombing Sam Altman’s S.F. mansion - San Francisco Chronicle
fullText: Federal agents raided the Texas home of the man suspected of throwing a Molotov cocktail at the San Francisco home of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

text: Justin Bieber’s Coachella Set Had Nothing to Do With Catalog Sale - Billboard
fullText: Speculation that Justin Bieber's Coachella set focused more on new material due to a 2023 catalog sale is misguided, music insiders say.

text: A Diarrhea-Causing Superbug Is on the Rise, Health Officials Warn - Gizmodo
fullText: Shigella bacteria are increasingly resisting all antibiotics that can easily treat them, a recent report shows.

text: NASA to Host Artemis II Crew Postflight News Conference - NASA (.gov)

text: iOS 26.5 beta 2 gives Apple Maps a new ads popup - 9to5Mac
fullText: iOS 26.5 beta 2 arrived today, and it lays the groundwork for ads coming to Apple Maps via a new popup. Here are the details.

text: DoorDasher joins Trump for impromptu White House press event after delivering McDonald's - CBS News
fullText: President Trump invited DoorDash delivery worker Sharon Simmons to talk about his "no tax on tips" policy.

text: Anna Kepner's stepbrother charged months after the cheerleader was found dead on a cruise ship - NBC News
fullText: Anna Kepner’s stepbrother has been indicted on federal charges months after the 18-year-old cheerleader was found dead during a family vacation on a Carnival cruise ship.

text: Hollywood stars sign open letter protesting the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger - NBC News

text: Ruby Rose Accuses Katy Perry of Sexual Assault; Perry Denies Claim - Variety
fullText: Katy Perry has been accused of sexually assaulting Ruby Rose at a Melbourne nightclub years ago, with Rose saying she was in her twenties.
